fyPerformance: FY26 revenue grew 10% to 4,265 Cr.
Adjusted EBITDA grew 12% to 452.5 Cr with margin at 10.6%.
PAT grew 21% to 378.8 Cr with PAT margin at 8.88%.
Q4 revenue grew 13% YoY and 15% QoQ to 1,172.8 Cr.
Value-added products contributed 42% of revenue.
highlights: Lead recycling capacity at Mundra expanded by 80,300 MTPA.
Lithium-ion battery recycling facility started at Mundra.
Copper recycling capacity is being added in Gujarat.
FY26 capex stood at 372 Cr.
Five-year revenue, EBITDA and PAT CAGR stood at 25%, 49% and 31%.
Company operates across 70+ countries with 14 manufacturing facilities.
Gravita India Ltd.quote: "Gravita ended FY26 on a strong note, continuing towards its growth trajectory."

fyPerformance: FY26 was described as one of the most remarkable years in the company's journey.
Q4 revenue grew 80% YoY and 20% QoQ to 932 Cr.
FY26 EBITDA stood at 218 Cr with improved earnings profile.
Q4 PAT grew 111% YoY to 38 Cr.
FY26 PAT grew 113% YoY to 139 Cr with PAT margin at 4.7%.
highlights: Lead recycling capacity at TKD increased by 55%.
Copper cathode plant of 36,000 MTPA is planned at TKD.
Copper production and sales volumes increased 7x in FY26.
Exports contributed 66% of total revenue.
Value-added products contributed 65% of lead segment revenue.
ROCE improved to 17%.
Pondy Oxides and Chemicals Ltd.quote: "FY26 stands as one of the most remarkable years in POCL's journey."

fyPerformance: FY26 revenue grew 48% YoY.
FY26 EBITDA grew 53% to around 559 Cr with margin at 5.9%.
FY26 PAT grew 56% to around 347 Cr.
FY26 volume growth stood at around 26.5%.
Q4 revenue grew 76% YoY to around 3,105 Cr.
highlights: Copper anode production began in March 2026.
Second furnace is in advanced installation stage.
Copper bus bar and rod capacity of 1,500 MT/month is planned.
Exports contributed 62% of FY26 revenue.
Copper and copper products contributed around 55% of revenue.
Q4 margin compression was described as transient.
Jain Resources Ltd.quote: "We delivered strong year-on-year growth across key financial parameters."

fyPerformance: FY26 was another year of strong execution despite geopolitical uncertainty.
The company delivered robust EBITDA margins of over 17%.
Three-year revenue, EBITDA and PAT CAGR stood at 23%, 37% and 34%.
Tire-crush capacity in India expanded 9% to 185,000 tons.
Varale plant reached 80% capacity utilization.
highlights: FY26 capex was over 100 Cr.
Solar capacity increased more than 3x to 4.48 MW.
Nearly 50% power requirement is expected from renewable sources from FY27.
PCMB contributed around 4% of FY26 revenue.
Haryana facility is expected to reach 18,000 TPA by Q1FY27-end.
Oman plant operated at 85% utilization and generated around 30 Cr revenue.
Tinna Rubber and Infrastructure Ltd.quote: "We remain focused on our expansion road map."

fyPerformance: FY26 revenue crossed 2,000 Cr for the first time.
Operational EBITDA crossed 100 Cr and PAT crossed 50 Cr for the first time.
Q4 was the best quarter with revenue around 735 Cr.
Q4 operational EBITDA stood at 36 Cr and PAT at 18.5 Cr.
Copper sales volume increased from around 18,000 MT last year to a much higher base.
highlights: Capacity reached 35,000 MT with the new integrated facility.
Value-added product mix improved through the year.
Q3 and Q4 EBITDA margin was around 5%.
ROE stood at 19.5% and ROCE at 16.3%.
EBITDA/kg for FY26 was around 43.
Management expects 15-20% minimum annual volume growth.
Bhagyanagar India Ltd.quote: "For the first time in our history, we have crossed 2,000 Cr of revenue."

fyPerformance: Q4 consolidated production stood at 41,268 tons, up 6.45% QoQ.
Q4 sales volume increased 12.25% QoQ to 45,162 MT.
Q4 revenue stood at 423.94 Cr.
Q4 EBITDA margin improved to 12.35%.
FY26 operating cash flow stood at 170 Cr.
highlights: 22,500-ton brownfield rPET expansion at Warangal was commissioned.
Net debt stood at around 375 Cr.
Standalone EBITDA margin improved 125 bps.
Demand visibility for rPET granules remains strong.
FSSAI-approved capacity in the market has grown to around 280,000 MT.
